summary: Systems architecture accepts the Radar Task UI after R2. The duplicate-submit issue is fixed with explicit isRunning state around the mock scan fetch, action boundaries are testable and run through existing helpers, client/server imports remain separated, and scope stays within the approved UI/server-action paths.
decisions: ACCEPT: The Run Scan control now uses explicit request lifecycle state and still forces useMockSerp=true through buildRunScanPayload().
ACCEPT: Server actions delegate to tested action handlers and reuse existing Radar Task helpers.
ACCEPT: Client components do not runtime-import Prisma/server-only helpers.
ACCEPT: The task scope now deliberately includes lib/radar-task-run-scan.ts.
